description:
- Fast content search tool for Unity project codebases of any size
- Searches file contents using regular expressions
- Supports full regex syntax (eg. "MonoBehaviour", "ScriptableObject", "SceneManager\\.sceneLoaded")
- Filter files by pattern with the include parameter (eg. "*.cs", "Assets/**/Editor/*.cs")
- By default, skips root-level generated directories such as Library/, Temp/, Obj/, Logs/, and Build*/
- Returns file paths and line numbers with at least one match sorted by path and line number
- You MUST set path explicitly; never rely on the current process directory
- Use this tool when you need to find scripts, callbacks, or other code patterns quickly

pattern.description: The regex pattern to search for in file contents

path.description: The directory to search in. Required.

include.description: File pattern to include in the search (e.g. "*.cs", "Assets/**/Editor/*.cs")
